glosses.ja: コミュニティー; 共同体

translations.en: Our community is planning a summer party.
translations.es: Nuestra comunidad está organizando una fiesta de verano.
translations.fr: Notre communauté organise une fête d’été.
translations.it: La nostra comunità sta organizzando una festa estiva.
translations.ko: 우리 커뮤니티가 여름 파티를 준비하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的社区正在筹办一个夏季派对。
translations.yue: 我哋社區正喺籌備一個夏日派對。
translations.pt: Nossa comunidade está organizando uma festa de verão.
translations.vi: Cộng đồng của chúng tôi đang lên kế hoạch cho một buổi tiệc mùa hè.
translations.hi: हमारा समुदाय गर्मियों की पार्टी की योजना बना रहा है.
translations.el: Η κοινότητά μας οργανώνει ένα καλοκαιρινό πάρτι.
translations.id: Komunitas kami sedang merencanakan pesta musim panas.
translations.ro: Comunitatea noastră plănuiește o petrecere de vară.
translations.ja: 私たちのコミュニティは夏のパーティーを計画しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Gemeinschaft'; agrees with feminine nominative singular; marks definiteness via possession.
Subject noun, feminine nominative singular; head of the NP 'Unsere Gemeinschaft'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; predicates the planning action by the subject.
Indefinite article introducing the direct object; accusative neuter singular, agreeing with 'Sommerfest'.
Direct object of 'plant'; neuter accusative singular; compound noun ('Sommer' + 'Fest').

sentences.target: Ich fühle mich in der Gemeinschaft wohl.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfyːlə mɪç ɪn deːɐ̯ gəˈmaɪ̯nʃaft voːl/

translations.de: Ich fühle mich in der Gemeinschaft wohl.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfyːlə mɪç ɪn deːɐ̯ gəˈmaɪ̯nʃaft voːl/
translations.en: I feel comfortable in the community.
translations.es: Me siento a gusto en la comunidad.
translations.fr: Je me sens bien dans la communauté.
translations.it: Mi sento a mio agio nella comunità.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在这个社区里感到很自在。
translations.yue: 我喺呢個社區覺得好自在。
translations.ru: Я чувствую себя комфортно в этом сообществе.
translations.pt: Eu me sinto à vontade na comunidade.
translations.vi: Tôi cảm thấy thoải mái trong cộng đồng.
translations.nl: Ik voel me op mijn gemak in de gemeenschap.
translations.uk: Я почуваюся комфортно в цій спільноті.
translations.hu: Jól érzem magam ebben a közösségben.
translations.hi: मैं इस समुदाय में सहज महसूस करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Czuję się swobodnie w tej społeczności.
translations.nb: Jeg føler meg vel i fellesskapet.
translations.id: Saya merasa nyaman di komunitas ini.
translations.sv: Jag känner mig bekväm i gemenskapen.
translations.ro: Mă simt în largul meu în comunitate.
translations.cs: Cítím se v této komunitě dobře.
translations.da: Jeg føler mig godt tilpas i fællesskabet.
translations.ja: このコミュニティで居心地がいいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; forms a reflexive construction with 'mich'.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; complements 'fühle' in a reflexive sense.
Preposition governing dative here; introduces the PP 'in der Gemeinschaft'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Gemeinschaft' as object of 'in'.
Object of the preposition 'in'; feminine dative singular; denotes the setting/location.
Adverb modifying the predicate; expresses the manner/comfort level of the feeling.

sentences.target: Die Gemeinschaft hilft neuen Nachbarn beim Umzug.
sentences.reading: /diː gəˈmaɪ̯nʃaft hɪlft ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈnaχbaʁn baɪ̯m ˈʊmtsuːk/

translations.de: Die Gemeinschaft hilft neuen Nachbarn beim Umzug.
translations.ipa: /diː gəˈmaɪ̯nʃaft hɪlft ˈnɔɪ̯ən ˈnaχbaʁn baɪ̯m ˈʊmtsuːk/
translations.en: The community helps new neighbors with their move.
translations.es: La comunidad ayuda a los nuevos vecinos con la mudanza.
translations.fr: La communauté aide les nouveaux voisins à déménager.
translations.it: La comunità aiuta i nuovi vicini con il trasloco.
translations.ko: 우리 공동체는 새 이웃의 이사를 도와요.
translations.zh-Hans: 社区会帮助新邻居搬家。
translations.ru: Сообщество помогает новым соседям с переездом.
translations.pt: A comunidade ajuda os novos vizinhos na mudança.
translations.he: הקהילה עוזרת לשכנים החדשים במעבר הדירה.
translations.tr: Topluluk yeni komşulara taşınmalarında yardımcı oluyor.
translations.vi: Cộng đồng giúp những hàng xóm mới chuyển nhà.
translations.ar: المجتمع يساعد الجيران الجدد في الانتقال.
translations.nl: De gemeenschap helpt nieuwe buren me de verhuizing.
translations.uk: Спільнота допомагає новим сусідам з переїздом.
translations.hu: A közösség segít az új szomszédoknak a költözésben.
translations.hi: समुदाय नए पड़ोसियों की घर बदलने में मदद करता है.
translations.pl: Społeczność pomaga nowym sąsiadom przy przeprowadzce.
translations.el: Η κοινότητα βοηθά τους νέους γείτονες με τη μετακόμιση.
translations.nb: Fellesskapet hjelper nye naboer med flyttingen.
translations.id: Komunitas membantu para tetangga baru saat mereka pindahan.
translations.sv: Gemenskapen hjälper nya grannar med flytten.
translations.ro: Comunitatea îi ajută pe noii vecini la mutare.
translations.cs: Komunita pomáhá novým sousedům při stěhování.
translations.da: Fællesskabet hjælper nye naboer med at flytte.
translations.ja: コミュニティは新しいご近所さんの引っ越しを手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner for the subject 'Gemeinschaft'.
Subject noun, feminine nominative singular; performs the helping action.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; takes a dative recipient.
Attributive adjective, dative plural; modifies 'Nachbarn' and agrees in case/number.
Indirect object/recipient in dative plural governed by 'hilft'.
Fused preposition+article ('bei dem'); preposition governing dative, introducing the PP 'beim Umzug'.
Object of the preposition 'bei'; dative singular; denotes the event during which help is given.

sentences.target: Wir gründen eine Gemeinschaft auf der Plattform.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡʁʏndən ˈaɪ̯nə gəˈmaɪ̯nʃaft aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈplatfɔʁm/

translations.de: Wir gründen eine Gemeinschaft auf der Plattform.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡʁʏndən ˈaɪ̯nə gəˈmaɪ̯nʃaft aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈplatfɔʁm/
translations.en: We are creating a community on the platform.
translations.es: Estamos creando una comunidad en la plataforma.
translations.fr: Nous créons une communauté sur la plateforme.
translations.it: Stiamo creando una comunità sulla piattaforma.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在平台上创建一个社区。
translations.yue: 我哋喺平台上面建立一個社區。
translations.pt: Estamos criando uma comunidade na plataforma.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tạo một cộng đồng trên nền tảng.
translations.nl: We starten een community op het platform.
translations.hi: हम प्लेटफ़ॉर्म पर एक समुदाय बना रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi oppretter et fellesskap på plattformen.
translations.id: Kami sedang membuat komunitas di platform.
translations.sv: Vi skapar en gemenskap på plattformen.
translations.da: Vi opretter et fællesskab på platformen.
translations.ja: 私たちはプラットフォーム上にコミュニティを作っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural, present indicative; denotes the act of establishing.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner for the direct object 'Gemeinschaft'.
Direct object, feminine accusative singular; entity being founded.
Preposition; here takes dative to indicate location; introduces the PP 'auf der Plattform'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Plattform' as object of 'auf'.
Object of the preposition 'auf'; feminine dative singular; indicates the location/context of founding.
